product_brief: Hardware-based cryptographic services on IBM Z mainframes supporting quantum-safe algorithms.
pqc_capability_description: Supports ML-DSA and ML-KEM (formerly CRYSTALS-Dilithium and CRYSTALS-Kyber) via ICSF CCA and PKCS #11 services on IBM z17, z16, and z15. Includes key generation, encryption, digital signatures (Pure and Pre-hash modes), and hybrid key exchange.
key_management_model: Hardware-backed key storage within IBM Z cryptographic components; supports Trusted Key Entry and generation via ICSF CCA/PKCS #11.
primary_platforms: IBM z/OS, IBM z17, IBM z16, IBM z15
target_industries: Enterprise (implied by IBM Z context), Finance, Government
pqc_roadmap_details: Migration from CRYSTALS-Dilithium and CRYSTALS-Kyber to ML-DSA and ML-KEM; includes discovery, risk assessment, and migration steps.
